test_atomic_process module

6.68006943e+02, 6.75751836e+02, 6.83586523e+02, 6.91512046e+02, 6.99529457e+02, 7.07639823e+02, 7.15844221e+02, 7.24143740e+02, 7.32539485e+02, 7.41032570e+02, 7.49624124e+02, 7.58315289e+02, 7.67107220e+02, 7.76001084e+02, 7.84998064e+02, 7.94099356e+02, 8.03306168e+02, 8.12619724e+02, 8.22041261e+02, 8.31572033e+02, 8.41213304e+02, 8.50966357e+02, 8.60832487e+02, 8.70813005e+02, 8.80909237e+02, 8.91122526e+02, 9.01454227e+02, 9.11905715e+02, 9.22478377e+02, 9.33173620e+02, 9.43992863e+02, 9.54937545e+02, 9.66009120e+02, 9.77209059e+02, 9.88538851e+02, 1.00000000e+03]))[source]

Bases: object

Class that stores the ionization rates for a given temperature grid.

get_Ar_tables()[source]

Returns 2D C-contiguous arrays for Argon states (0 to 8).

get_H_tables()[source]

Returns flat arrays for Hydrogen.

test_atomic_process.assert_densities_match(t_chequp, n_chequp, t_ode, n_ode, tol, species_name)[source]

Interpolates ODE solution and asserts deviation from CHEQUP is within tolerance.

test_atomic_process.fast_cross_section_jit(Z, Zstar, E_grid, me_c2, binding_arr, E_ion_true)[source]

Computes the cross-section for a given atomic number and temperature.

test_atomic_process.get_rate_3body(Te_eV, Z, Zstar)[source]

Returns the 3-body recombination rate for a given atomic number and temperature.

test_atomic_process.get_rate_ex_ion(Te_eV, Z, Zstar)[source]

Returns the excitation ionization rate for a given atomic number and temperature.

test_atomic_process.get_species_indices()[source]

Returns a list of species indices from the species.net file.

test_atomic_process.make_ode_ar_h(tables: RateTables, idx_H0, idx_H1, idx_Ar)[source]

Factory that extracts variables and functions from the RateTables object and returns a function that can be used in the ODE solver.

test_atomic_process.ode_rhs_ar_h_jit(t, state, log_Te_grid, log_ion_H, log_3b_H, log_ex_H, E_ion_H, E_ex_H, log_ion_Ar, log_3b_Ar, log_ex_Ar, E_ion_Ar, E_ex_Ar, idx_H0, idx_H1, idx_Ar)[source]

ODE Solver for the Argon-Hydrogen mixture.

test_atomic_process.run_castro_simulation(model='gamma_law_2T', runtime_options='')[source]

Runs a Castro simulation.

test_atomic_process.test_0D_Ar_H_mix(tol=11)[source]

Unit test for the 0D Ar-H mixture.
